---
title: "Statistical Analysis I"
subtitle: Fall 2026
date: last-modified
author: Mark Himmelstein and Jess Helmer
format: html
---

## Overview

Welcome to the website for **PSYC 6019 Statistical Analysis I** / **PSYC 6022 Psychological Statistics for HCI** for Fall 2026!

<div>
```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="lab/slides/test_presentation.html"></iframe>
```
</div>

### Some Code

Here is some example code.

```{r}
1 + 2
```

And an example plot.

```{r}
iris |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = Petal.Length, y = Petal.Width)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point()
```
